title: Invisible 3D Artifacts for EpicFight
description: This pack hides the 3D textures of artifacts from Terramity, Artifacts, and Goety to prevent visual conflicts with the EpicFight mod.
body:
This resource pack makes the 3D textures of artifacts from the Terramity mod invisible, resolving visual issues with the EpicFight mod. Ideal for players looking for a temporary solution until the EFM team achieves full compatibility with the Curios API.

Support will also be given to other mods if required.

For now it is compatible with:
- [Terramity](https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity) ✅ (Approved by the creator)
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) ✅ (Approved by the creator)
- [Goety - The Dark Arts](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety) ✅ (Approved by the creator)
  
Before
![Before](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExY2phYmdkOG4xbWkyanFtNGh2cWxwamFsNWRybXlyZ2VicXB5b2dhcCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/74Qfz65FZG1yOvbYnQ/giphy.gif)

After
![After](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcWlxbmttY2pxdTlvemQzczU1ejA0bDFqYWJjOWN3dnlwem9oZzJodiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/EGThFt9fa2zmfXPFLV/giphy.gif)
 

How was it made?
Simple solution: the 3D textures of the artifacts were made invisible.


Can artifacts from other mods be added?
I have already written to several modders and am waiting for their response to add more mods to the list.


Why was it made?
To be able to use the EpicFight mod without the visual bug of the artifacts. We want to look great while fighting!

Does the Curios mod have a button that makes artifacts invisible?
Correct! But most people don't use it or don't know it exists. Some even like to look like monstrosities to ruin the photos.

But Curios has a setting that disables 3D rendering
This is also true, but the setting is mostly useless for some reason.

The Invisible 3D Artifacts for EpicFight Team
